label: M6_DCM-Auth
info:
Backend flows for Authentication, Invitation, and Session Management.

MongoDB collections:
  - auth_users
  - auth_sessions
  - dcm_users
  - dcm_roles
  - dcm_audit_log

Operations:
  - login: validate credentials (bcrypt + legacy plaintext fallback)
  - checkAuth: verify session token
  - logOut: invalidate session
  - hydrateSession: return user with roles + flattened permissions
  - changePassword: update password (gated)

Default admin seeded on deploy:
  - username: admin / password: 1234
  - Also seeds dcm_users row and 3 system roles (admin, editor, viewer)

name: ══ Authentication Backend ══
info:
Handles user authentication, session management, and credential validation.

Responses go back to Dashboard uibuilder via link-out → dashboard-linkin.

name: ── LOGIN ──
info:
1. Receives login request with username/password
2. Looks up user in auth_users collection
3. Verifies password (bcrypt compare with plaintext fallback for seeded admin)
4. Returns success with session token, user info, roles, and flattened permissions

name: prepare login lookup
verify password & build session
resolve roles → permissions
flatten permissions & build login response
restore login response
func:
msg.payload = msg._savedResponse;
return msg;

name: ── CHECK AUTH ──
info: Validates an existing session token against auth_sessions collection.

name: prepare session lookup
validate session
prepare session delete
logout response
── HYDRATE SESSION ──
info:
Returns user with roles and flattened permissions for the current session.
Called after login to populate the frontend store.

name: hydrate: find session
hydrate: lookup dcm_user
hydrate: find roles
hydrate: build response
── VERIFY INVITATION (pre-auth) ──
info: Validates an invitation token. No auth required.

name: changePassword (stub)
── SEED DEFAULT USER + SYSTEM ROLES ──
info:
On deploy, ensures:
1. Default admin in auth_users
2. Default admin in dcm_users
3. System roles (admin, editor, viewer) in dcm_roles

name: prepare admin upsert (auth_users)
prepare admin upsert (dcm_users)
seed system roles
loop: next role
audit: login.success
restore login response
func:
msg.payload = msg._savedLoginResponse;
return msg;

name: audit: login.failed
restore failed response
func:
msg.payload = msg._savedLoginResponse;
return msg;

name: write heartbeat
